330.reason: [The read() method uses readLine() which strips newline characters, so the returned string loses all '\n' characters. This causes the Lexer to never encounter '\n' and thus never increment lineNum, making all tokens appear on line 1. The error detection for line numbers will be incorrect.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The read() method uses readLine() which strips newline characters, so the returned string loses all '\n' characters. This causes the Lexer to never encounter '\n' and thus never increment lineNum, making all tokens appear on line 1. The error detection for line numbers will be incorrect.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The read() method uses readLine() which strips newline characters. When the input file contains a single line without a trailing newline, the returned string will not end with '\n'. However, the Lexer.fsa() method relies on '\n' characters to track line numbers. If the last line of the input does not end with a newline, the line number for tokens on that line may be incorrect, and the error line number output could be off by one.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  当注释位于文件末尾时，j+1可能越界导致IndexOutOfBoundsException，缺少j + 1 < len的边界检查
